description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent control panel and a large display screen set into a black frame. The side panels are adorned with vivid artwork depicting a robotic, red-eyed canine head in a fiery, digital landscape, adding a cyber-fantasy theme. The front panel includes a coin slot and a lower access door, while the control panel is equipped with a joystick and several buttons, all color-coded for easy identification. The marquee at the top displays the game title 'CYBER SWING' in a futuristic font, illuminated against a dark background. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood or MDF with a matte black finish, accented by glossy printed graphics. The overall build is sturdy and designed for public or recreational use, typical of arcade environments.
description: A black upright arcade game cabinet with cyber-themed side art, a joystick and buttons, and a 'CYBER SWING' marquee. The front features a coin slot and a large display screen.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the detailed cybernetic canine artwork and part of the control panel with a blue joystick.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black back panel with no visible features or artwork.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same cybernetic canine artwork and partial view of the control panel.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the 'CYBER SWING' marquee, display screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, and the coin slot.
attribute_screen_type: CRT or flat LCD, medium-sized, flat with a visible bezel; exact type unknown but typical of arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one blue joystick on the left and several colored buttons arranged to the right; simple and uncluttered.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'CYBER SWING' in a futuristic, digital font with blue and red accents on a dark background.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Vivid artwork of a robotic, red-eyed canine head with metallic features and a fiery, digital background in red and orange hues.
